# Task brief — <title>

> What the human hands the Orchestrator to kick off a unit of work (a.k.a. a "lot").
> Keep it short — the `planner` expands it into a real plan.

- **Goal:** <one sentence — the outcome, not the implementation>
- **Type:** feature | fix | refactor | chore | spike
- **Why now:** <the value / what it unblocks>
- **In scope:**
  - <bullet>
- **Out of scope:**
  - <bullet — guards against scope creep>
- **Decisions already made (do not re-open):** <links to ADRs, or "none">
- **Done when:** <observable, testable conditions>
- **Suggested workflow:** <see PLAYBOOK "task types" — e.g. plan → build → review>
